assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address or Google credentials.
The developer is a new stand-alone account owner rather than an invited user on an existing account.
No IBM Cloud product, project, or interface has been selected yet.

developer_goal: Create an IBM Cloud owner account and reach the earliest meaningful hosted workload first success.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved: platform onboarding points to many tools and a large catalog rather than one default workload terminal.
first_success.observable_signal: Candidates include a Code Engine Hello World response, Cloud Shell local sample output, or another catalog product result.

route_selection.rule: Do not invent a platform-wide winner among Code Engine, Cloud Shell, Kubernetes Service, CLI, and other catalog products.

candidates.name: Code Engine Hello World console or CLI
candidates.reason: Complete hosted Hello World path, but platform docs do not recommend Code Engine over other catalog products; Pay-as-you-Go is required for Code Engine.

candidates.name: IBM Cloud Shell sample
candidates.reason: Ends with a Node.js app running locally in Cloud Shell rather than a generally applicable hosted resource outcome.

candidates.name: IBM Cloud Kubernetes Service getting started
candidates.reason: Service-specific cluster and sample path with different prerequisites and gates.

candidates.name: Owner registration versus invited-user access
candidates.reason: Invited users skip owner registration and billing setup; that branch is not comparable to new-owner signup.

required_path.action: Open IBM Cloud registration and create an owner account with email or Google credentials plus the registration information IBM requests.

required_fields.label: Additional registration information
required_fields.notes: Official checklist states additional registration information is required but does not enumerate the live fields.

required_path.observable_result: The new owner account can proceed to first login.

required_path.action: On first login, provide a credit card or subscription code to complete stand-alone account setup.

required_fields.label: Credit card or IBM Cloud subscription code

required_path.observable_result: The IBM Cloud console opens for the account owner.

required_path.action: Select one IBM Cloud product and interface for the first workload success.
required_path.observable_result: One bounded IBM Cloud first-success route is fixed.

prerequisites.description: Access as a new account owner or as a user invited to an existing IBM Cloud account.

external_gates.description: Stand-alone owner setup requires a credit card or subscription code before resource creation.
Code Engine documentation requires a Pay-as-you-Go account for that product path.

unavoidable_waits.description: Code Engine application status must reach Ready before the Hello World test request succeeds on that candidate route.

platform_outcomes.description: Completed owner setup opens the IBM Cloud console for resource work.
On the Code Engine candidate route, a Ready application exposes a URL that can return Hello World.

excluded.item: Reading the onboarding checklist and platform overview
excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence for route choice, not a counted action.

excluded.item: Asserting Code Engine as IBM Cloud's universal first mile
excluded.reason: Platform docs direct developers to browse a large catalog without selecting one default product.

sources.title: IBM Cloud onboarding checklist and quick start
Getting started with IBM Cloud Shell
Getting started with IBM Cloud Code Engine

uncertainties.question: Which IBM Cloud product and interface define the selected first-success route?
uncertainties.impact: Required actions, Pay-as-you-Go entitlements, and terminals differ across Code Engine, Cloud Shell, Kubernetes, and other catalog entries.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one product goal, then a current console or CLI walkthrough from owner signup to that terminal.

uncertainties.question: What exact fields does cloud.ibm.com/registration require today for email versus Google signup?
uncertainties.impact: Owner account field counts cannot be verified from checklist prose alone.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of the live registration and first-login billing screens.
